ddls:
CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "given_lat" REAL /* Latitude provided in the query */,
  "given_lon" REAL /* Longitude provided in the query */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the provided coordinates to the formatted address */,
  "formatted_address" TEXT /* Formatted address string */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the formatted address */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the formatted address */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name associated with the address (if any) */,
  "housenumber" TEXT /* House number of the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the address */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the address */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb or neighborhood of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the address */,
  "attribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data attribution */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address was last verified */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the address verification (e.g., 'verified', 'unverified') */,
  "geolocation_source" TEXT /* Source of the geolocation data (e.g., 'OpenStreetMap', 'Google Maps') */,
  "geolocation_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the geolocation data */,
  "address_format" TEXT /* Format of the address (e.g., 'standard', 'international') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_attribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribution_id") REFERENCES data_attributions ("attribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_attributions" (
  "attribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data attribution */,
  "attribution_text" TEXT /* Text of the attribution */,
  "license" TEXT /* License of the data source */,
  "attribution_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source's attribution page */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the attribution information was last updated */,
  "terms_of_service" TEXT /* URL to the terms of service for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., 'Logistics', 'Customer Service') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the address */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the address was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the address data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., 'correction', 'update') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_changes_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was made */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query used */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  "search_location" TEXT /* Location from which the search was made (e.g., 'Seattle, WA') */,
  "search_radius" REAL /* Radius of the search area in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address being validated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the address is valid */,
  "validation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the validation result (if invalid) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., 'manual', 'automated') */,
  "validation_source" TEXT /* Source of the validation data (e.g., 'internal', 'external') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_validations_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_validations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
